parameters.jsCode:
const health = $('Postgres: Get Deal Health').first()?.json || {};
const stakeholders = $('Postgres: Get Stakeholders').all().map(i => i.json);
const score_history = $('Postgres: Get Score History').all().map(i => i.json);
const notifications = $('Postgres: Get Notifications').all().map(i => i.json);
const prior_outputs = $('Postgres: Get Outputs').all().map(i => i.json);

const result = {
  deal_id: health.deal_id || '',
  company_name: health.company_name || '',
  deal_stage: health.deal_stage || '',
  deal_value_usd: health.deal_value_usd || null,
  close_date: health.close_date || null,
  forecast_category: health.forecast_category || '',
  scored_at: health.scored_at || null,
  scores: {
    pain: health.pain_score ?? 0,
    power: health.power_score ?? 0,
    vision: health.vision_score ?? 0,
    value: health.value_score ?? 0,
    change: health.change_score ?? 0,
    control: health.control_score ?? 0,
    total: health.p2v2c2_total ?? 0
  },
  cas: health.critical_activity_stage || '',
  trend_direction: health.trend_direction || 'stable',
  score_vs_previous: health.score_vs_previous ?? 0,
  next_step: health.next_step || '',
  next_step_date: health.next_step_date || null,
  pe_sponsor_score: health.pe_sponsor_score ?? 0,
  dap: {
    exists: health.dap_exists || false,
    agreed: health.dap_agreed || false,
    has_14_day_gap: health.dap_has_14_day_gap || false,
    next_milestone: health.dap_next_milestone || '',
    next_milestone_date: health.dap_next_milestone_date || null,
    timeline: health.dap_timeline || [],
    status: health.dap_status || '',
    milestones_complete: health.dap_milestones_complete ?? 0,
    milestones_total: health.dap_milestones_total ?? 14,
    summary: health.dap_summary || ''
  },
  risks: health.risks || [],
  general_narrative: health.general_narrative || '',
  stakeholders,
  score_history,
  pending_notifications: notifications.filter(n => n.id),
  prior_outputs
};

return [{ json: result }];

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT id, notification_type, summary, context, created_at FROM deal_notifications WHERE deal_id = '" + $('Code: Extract Deal ID').first().json.deal_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "' AND read_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5" }}
={{ "UPDATE deal_notifications SET read_at = NOW() WHERE deal_id = '" + $('Code: Extract Deal ID').first().json.deal_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "' AND read_at IS NULL" }}
